figures.caption: Figure 1: Synthetic verification of the sketched contrastive scaling law. Top-left: approximation error versus sketch dimension M . Top-right: GD bias versus the number of GD iterations L, compared with the bias reference. Bottom-left: GD empirical variance versus L compared with variance reference, with vertical markers indicating the two variance regimes. Bottom-right: empirical excess risk along GD compared with the empirical bias-plus-variance.
